name: Mahaprasad
title: Developer
bio:
Mahaprasad Mohanty is currently a Data Science Intern at Solytics Partners, where he builds advanced agentic systems for compliance. He is pursuing an M.Sc. in Data Science at VIT Vellore, and previously graduated as a gold medalist from Sri Sri University.

With a strong foundation in deep learning and natural language processing, he has also worked at IISc Bangalore on physics-informed neural networks, exploring the intersection of mathematical modeling and modern machine learning.

Beyond his technical pursuits, Mahaprasad is a thoughtful learner with a deep interest in philosophy, fitness, and creative writing. He approaches problem-solving with both analytical rigor and creativity. Driven by a commitment to lifelong learning, he seeks to apply his skills to meaningful, real-world challenges while maintaining a balanced and reflective outlook on life.
